text: Faster R-CNN (Ren et al. 2015, Microsoft) introduced the Region Proposal Network (RPN), enabling end-to-end training of object detection by sharing convolutional features between proposal generation and detection.

YOLO (Redmon et al. 2016) reframed object detection as a single regression problem, predicting bounding boxes and class probabilities directly from full images in one evaluation — enabling real-time detection.
DETR (Carion et al. 2020, Meta AI) introduced a Transformer-based end-to-end object detector using bipartite matching loss, eliminating the need for hand-crafted components like NMS and anchor boxes.
